title: Auto-handle / deflection rate (share of emails resolved without human drafting)
measure: Share of handled emails auto-sent under the approved whitelist, from the audit log
target: ≥ 30% of eligible low-risk categories by end of PH-2
custom_attributes: {"v1": {"ID": "KPI-001", "Metric": "Auto-handle / deflection rate (share of emails resolved without human drafting)", "Baseline": "0% (all manual today)", "Target": "≥ 30% of eligible low-risk categories by end of PH-2", "Measurement method": "Share of handled emails auto-sent under the approved whitelist, from the audit log", "Status": "Approved"}}

title: Human handling time saved per triaged email
measure: Timer from assignment to send, compared to the PH-1 assisted baseline
custom_attributes: {"v1": {"ID": "KPI-002", "Metric": "Human handling time saved per triaged email", "Baseline": "0% (baseline manual time captured in PH-1)", "Target": "≥ 40% median reduction vs PH-1 baseline", "Measurement method": "Timer from assignment to send, compared to the PH-1 assisted baseline", "Status": "Approved"}}

title: Reply quality / accuracy
measure: Labeled-corpus eval (`EXP-001`) + sampled human review of approved replies
target: Top-1 category accuracy ≥ 85% (`NFR-001`); approved-reply edit rate ≤ 20%
custom_attributes: {"v1": {"ID": "KPI-003", "Metric": "Reply quality / accuracy", "Baseline": "n/a", "Target": "Top-1 category accuracy ≥ 85% (`NFR-001`); approved-reply edit rate ≤ 20%", "Measurement method": "Labeled-corpus eval (`EXP-001`) + sampled human review of approved replies", "Status": "Approved"}}
